concepts.name: ineffective
concepts.description: The therapy has been found to not have the desired therapeutic benefit on the patient.

concepts.name: detected issue
concepts.description: There is a clinical issue for the therapy that makes continuation of the therapy inappropriate. *Open Issue:* The definition of this code does not correctly represent the concept space of its specializations (children)

concepts.name: no longer required for treatment
concepts.frDisplayName: n'est plus nécessaire pour le traitement
concepts.description: The underlying condition has been resolved or has evolved such that a different treatment is no longer needed.

concepts.name: Other
concepts.enDisplayName: This medication has been discontinued, please see the notes for details.
concepts.frDisplayName: Le patient ne doit plus prendre ce médicament. Voir les notes.

concepts.name: patient refuse
concepts.description: The patient refused to take the product.

concepts.name: change in order
concepts.description: Item in current order is no longer in use as requested and a new one has/will be created to replace it.

concepts.name: obsolete
concepts.description: This Act instance has been replaced by a new instance.

concepts.name: detected issue
concepts.description: There is a clinical issue for the therapy that makes continuation of the therapy inappropriate. *Open Issue:* The definition of this code does not correctly represent the concept space of its specializations (children)
